Package com.yanimetaxas.realitycheck

Class FutureCheck<T>

java.lang.Object
com.yanimetaxas.realitycheck.AbstractCheck<FutureCheck<T>,CompletableFuture<T>>
com.yanimetaxas.realitycheck.FutureCheck<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the result type
All Implemented Interfaces:
Check<FutureCheck<T>,CompletableFuture<T>>
public final class FutureCheck<T> extends AbstractCheck<FutureCheck<T>,CompletableFuture<T>>
Fluent assertions for CompletableFuture values.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FutureCheck<T>
    completesWithin(Duration timeout)
    Waits for the future to complete within the given timeout.
    ObjectCheck<T>
    hasValue()
    Blocks until the future completes (up to 10 seconds) and returns a check on the result value.
    FutureCheck<T>
    hasValue(T expected)
    Blocks (up to 10 seconds) and asserts the result equals the expected value.
    ObjectCheck<T>
    hasValueWithin(Duration timeout)
    Blocks until the future completes within the given timeout and returns a check on the result.
    FutureCheck<T>
    isCancelled()
     
    FutureCheck<T>
    isCompletedExceptionally()
     
    FutureCheck<T>
    isCompletedNormally()
     
    FutureCheck<T>
    isDone()
     
    FutureCheck<T>
    isNotCancelled()
     
    FutureCheck<T>
    isNotDone()

  • Method Details

    • isDone

      public FutureCheck<T> isDone()

    • isNotDone

      public FutureCheck<T> isNotDone()

    • isCancelled

      public FutureCheck<T> isCancelled()

      public FutureCheck<T> isNotCancelled()

    • isCompletedExceptionally

      public FutureCheck<T> isCompletedExceptionally()

    • isCompletedNormally

      public FutureCheck<T> isCompletedNormally()

    • completesWithin

      public FutureCheck<T> completesWithin(Duration timeout)
      Waits for the future to complete within the given timeout. Fails if the future does not complete in time.

    • hasValue

      public ObjectCheck<T> hasValue()
      Blocks until the future completes (up to 10 seconds) and returns a check on the result value.

    • hasValueWithin

      public ObjectCheck<T> hasValueWithin(Duration timeout)
      Blocks until the future completes within the given timeout and returns a check on the result.

    • hasValue

      public FutureCheck<T> hasValue(T expected)
      Blocks (up to 10 seconds) and asserts the result equals the expected value.
